name: Bob Howard
abstract: Bob Howard (born Howard Joyner, June 20, 1906 – December 3, 1986; another source gives his birth date as June 20, 1897) was an American pianist-vocalist on swing records in the 1930s. Born in Newton, Massachusetts, Joyner began singing in New York night clubs in the mid-1920s.

concerts.label: Carnegie Pop Concert: Salute to Fats Waller

about_quotes.speaker: Marty Grosz
about_quotes.evidence: Like downstairs they have those collections — Ethel Waters, Bob Howard, Teddy Wilson—I’m just trying to think. You know those, I’ve heard all, not all, but a lot of the greats
